qualifications.name: Diploma in Agriculture
notes: Department: Agriculture.
Minimum APS: ecp: 28 with Mathematics OR 29 with Technical Mathematics; mainstream: 30 with Mathematics OR 31 with Technical Mathematics.
APS method: Method 1.
Additional requirements: Life Sciences or Physical Sciences.
Faculty notes: Meeting minimum admission requirements does not guarantee admission; ECP admission is subject to space availability; APS calculation uses Method 1 as indicated in the brochure.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Environmental Management
notes: Department: Environmental and Occupational Studies.

Minimum APS: ecp: 26 with Mathematics OR 27 with Technical Mathematics OR 28 with Mathematical Literacy; mainstream: 28 with Mathematics OR 29 with Technical Mathematics OR 30 with Mathematical Literacy.
APS method: Method 1.

Additional requirements: At least Mathematics level 3; At least Mathematical Literacy level 5; At least Technical Mathematics level 4; At least Geography or Life Sciences level 4; Any other two subjects at level 3 except Life Orientation.
Faculty notes: Meeting minimum admission requirements does not guarantee admission; ECP admission is subject to space availability; APS calculation uses Method 1 as indicated in the brochure.
